summary: Adjusted the opening so it enters at the porch threshold rather than repeating the next chapter's climb-and-blast scaffold, and added a light ledger/oilcloth handoff so the morning carry into chapter 3 reads continuous.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph around Della at the porch step while preserving her arrival from Old Sion and the dam boom.
Clarified that the oilcloth remains at hand overnight even after Della rewraps the ledger in a dish towel.
Tuned the closing sentence to imply the chosen danger will travel with Della into morning.
